turns.query: Analyze the pollution situation at air quality station: Construction Building on 2025-06-02.
turns.actual_response:
根据我的多次查询，在数据库中没有找到名为"Construction Building"的站点（无论是air_quality_station还是dust_station表中）。该站点名称在数据库中不存在。

让我报告这个未解析的实体：

**UNRESOLVED: Construction Building**

由于无法解析站点名称"Construction Building"到数据库中的任何有效ID，我无法获取该站点在2025-06-02的逐小时PM2.5数据。

可能的原因：
1. 站点名称可能是中文，而非英文"Construction Building"
2. 站点可能使用了不同的命名方式
3. 该站点可能在数据库中不存在

请提供更准确的站点名称或站点ID，以便我能够获取所需的数据。
validation_errors: Custom validator failed: mean_pm25 not set

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试精确匹配站点名称
query = text("""SELECT id, name, station_type, district_id, city_id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'Construction Building'""")
df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print(df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 精确查找名为"Construction Building"的dust_station
query = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station WHERE name = 'Construction Building'""")
df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("精确匹配Construction Building:", df)

# 查找所有英文名称的dust_station站点
query2 = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station WHERE name ~ '^[A-Za-z ]+$' LIMIT 20""")
df2 = pd.read_sql(query2, engine)

print("相关站点名称:", df3)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 直接搜索hourly_dust_station_air_quality表中是否有名为"Construction Building"的站点数据
query = text("""
SELECT DISTINCT ds.id, ds.name 
FROM hourly_dust_station_air_quality hdsaq 
JOIN dust_station ds ON hdsaq.station_id = ds.id 
WHERE ds.name = 'Construction Building'
""")
df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("Construction Building站点:", df)

# 尝试查找所有可能的英文名称站点（包含空格）
query2 = text("""
SELECT id, name FROM dust_station 
WHERE name LIKE '%C%o%n%s%t%r%u%c%t%i%o%n%' OR name LIKE '%B%u%i%l%d%i%n%g%'
LIMIT 20
""")
df2 = pd.read_sql(query2, engine)
print("模糊匹配结果:", df2)

# 查看hourly_dust_station_air_quality表在2025-06-02有哪些站点有数据
query3 = text("""
SELECT DISTINCT ds.id, ds.name 
FROM hourly_dust_station_air_quality hdsaq 
JOIN dust_station ds ON hdsaq.station_id = ds.id 
WHERE DATE(hdsaq.timestamp) = '2025-06-02'
ORDER BY ds.name
LIMIT 30
""")
df3 = pd.read_sql(query3, engine)
print("2025-06-02有数据的站点:", df3)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 使用已存在的 df_station 数据框（包含 Construction Building 站点 2025-06-02 的小时数据）
# 检查 df_station 是否存在并查看其内容
if 'df_station' in globals() and not df_station.empty:
    print("df_station 存在，查看前几行：")
    print(df_station.head())
    print(f"\n数据形状：{df_station.shape}")
    print(f"\n列名：{df_station.columns.tolist()}")
else:
    print("df_station 不存在或为空，需要重新查询")
    # 查询 Construction Building 站点在 2025-06-02 的数据
    query_station = text("""
    SELECT hdsaq.pm2_5, hdsaq.pm10, hdsaq.temperature, hdsaq.humidity, hdsaq.timestamp
    FROM hourly_dust_station_air_quality hdsaq
    JOIN dust_station ds ON hdsaq.station_id = ds.id
    WHERE ds.name = 'Construction Building'
    AND DATE(hdsaq.timestamp) = '2025-06-02'
    ORDER BY hdsaq.timestamp
    """)
    df_station = pd.read_sql(query_station, engine)
    print(df_station)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先查找 Construction Building 站点的信息
query_find_station = text("""
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, ds.station_code, cs.name as construction_site_name
FROM dust_station ds
JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
WHERE ds.name LIKE '%Construction%' OR cs.name LIKE '%Construction%'
LIMIT 10
""")
df_find = pd.read_sql(query_find_station, engine)
print("查找 Construction 相关站点：")
print(df_find)

# 如果找不到，列出所有 dust_station
if df_find.empty:
    query_all_stations = text("""
    SELECT id, name, station_code FROM dust_station LIMIT 20
    """)
    df_all = pd.read_sql(query_all_stations, engine)
    print("\n所有 dust_station 前20条：")
    print(df_all)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查找所有包含 "Building" 的站点名称

SELECT ds.id, ds.name, ds.station_code, cs.name as construction_site_name
FROM dust_station ds
JOIN construction_site cs ON ds.construction_site_id = cs.id
WHERE ds.name LIKE '%Building%' OR cs.name LIKE '%Building%'
LIMIT 20
""")
df_building = pd.read_sql(query_building, engine)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 检查dust_station表，因为"Construction Building"可能是扬尘监测站

SELECT id, name, station_code, construction_site_id 
FROM dust_station 
WHERE name ILIKE '%Construction%' OR name ILIKE '%Building%' OR name ILIKE '%建筑%' OR name ILIKE '%施工%'
LIMIT 20
""")
df_dust = pd.read_sql(query_dust, engine)
